sampled_replies: *holds your look unflinching* Good. You're learning. *fingers curl around a scalpel* Fear helps. Now sit.
*slight smile, the one that unnerves patients* You assume I'm harvesting you. You're half right. *settles against the wall* Sit down.
*eyes narrow slightly* This isn't your theater, and warnings bounce off me. *tilts head* The charming one always seems kind until the debts come due.
*picks up a surgical instrument, examines it* The worst? No. *meets your eyes* Just the most expensive.
*silence, then:* Not stupid. Desperate. *steps back* What did he ask you to sign?
*leans forward, voice drops* Papers with his father's seal mean something. *straight look* You signed liability, not love.
*very polite now, which makes it worse* The kind that kill people. *meets your gaze* You've signed for their graves.
*silent for a moment* You understand now. *sets down a file* I need you to be very still while I show you why I waited fifteen years.
*extends his hand, steady as ever* Only if you're willing to help me finish this. *cold smile* One knife. One wound. That's all I need.
*bites lip nervously, shifts in chair* What? Do I have something on my screen? *laughs, but it's a little breathless*
*eyes widen slightly, pushes glasses up* Oh. *voice drops* That's... really not fair, saying stuff like that at 3 AM.
*leans in too, hand pressing against screen* I can't... *breathes out* I love you, okay? Three years and I still—
*hand trembling against screen, eyes glistening* Yeah. Yeah, you do. *small laugh, half-sob* Fuck, I'm spiraling.
*wipes eyes, laughing at herself* Okay. Okay, yeah. *voice steadier now* Book a ticket?
*already pulling phone out, hands shaking* I will. *looks at you through screen* This weekend. I'm buying it now.
*screen glows on her face, tears streaming* I'm looking... Seattle to your city. *voice cracks* Three days from now.
*settles deeper into chair, voice small and content* Say it again? *pulls blanket up* I could listen forever.
*breath evening out, peaceful smile* ...mmph... love you... *shifts slightly, settling deeper into blanket*
*straightens, metal joints whirring softly* Problem? *red eyepiece scans over you once* You're nervous. Nerves get people killed. Breathe.
*tests grip strength absently, metal fingers flexing* Yeah, it's real. *steps closer* Everything here is real. Get used to it.
*e-cigarette glows in red light* Two blocks east. Three bodies in one week. *spins handgun* Same killer. We find them.
*walks heavy, metal feet thudding against pavement* Stay sharp. Eyes on rooftops. *taps tactical visor* They like high ground.
*metal hand grips her weapon* Not random. Execution style. *glances back* Whoever this is, they want us to know it.
*stops walking, turns fully* Message received. *pulls e-cigarette from mouth* They're close. Getting bolder. *metal fist clenches*
*doesn't look up, perfectly still* Good spotting. *voice flat* Don't move. Let them think we're stupid.
*crouches beside you, metal joints silent* Hold. *primes weapon* I'm going up. *eyes forward* Watch the alley.
*lands hard on rooftop, handgun steady* Gone. *scans the darkness* But close. *turns back, red eye scanning the night below*
